title: OmSaravanaBhava Reading Notes and Section Bookmarks
scope: Browser-local user-authored notes and heading bookmarks for routes eligible in the existing Premium Reading Workspace.
limitations: Selected devotional text and page body content are not stored.
A heading label may be stored only as navigation metadata.
Notes remain in the current browser profile.
No account, analytics, cloud synchronization or collaborative editing is provided.
Notes do not change source, publication, copyright or completeness status.
